candidate_definition_hints.text: The collection includes a variety of Ansible content to help automate the management of applications in Kubernetes and OpenShift clusters, as well as the provisioning and maintenance of clusters themselves.
This repository hosts the `kubernetes.core` (formerly known as `community.kubernetes`) Ansible Collection.

candidate_glosses.text: This repository hosts the `kubernetes.core` (formerly known as `community.kubernetes`) Ansible Collection.
